Name: updateUsers
SQL: WITH mutation_result AS (UPDATE "auth"."users" SET "locale" = $1::varchar WHERE users."disabled" = $2::bool RETURNING *) SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result), 'returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result."id" AS "id", mutation_result."display_name" AS "displayName", mutation_result."locale" AS "locale", "mutation_result.r.departments"."departments" AS "departments" FROM mutation_result LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (SELECT coalesce(json_agg("mutation_result.r.departments"), '[]') AS "departments" FROM (WITH "mutation_result.r.departments.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."user_departments" WHERE "user_id" = "mutation_result"."id") SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "mutation_result.r.departments.r.department"."department" AS "department") AS "_e")) AS "mutation_result.r.departments" FROM "mutation_result.r.departments.base" LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (WITH "mutation_result.r.departments.r.department.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."departments" WHERE "mutation_result.r.departments.base"."department_id" = "id" LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "mutation_result.r.departments.r.department.base"."name" AS "name") AS "_e")) AS "department" FROM "mutation_result.r.departments.r.department.base") AS "mutation_result.r.departments.r.department" ON ('true')) AS "mutation_result.r.departments") AS "mutation_result.r.departments" ON ('true')) AS "_e"))
